mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.name, a.name as "attrName", g.number, g.spec, c.name as "categoryName", g.brand, g.unit, g.code, g.`data` as remark FROM is_goods g LEFT JOIN is_category c ON g.category = c.id LEFT join is_attr a on g.id = a.pid GROUP BY g.id, g.name, g.number, g.spec, g.brand, g.unit, g.code, g.data, g.threshold, c.name, a.name ORDER BY g.id DESC
